name: Savory Tofu Sauce (Vegan) for Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp chopped fresh basil (1 tsp dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth and combined.
This recipe provides a clear, step-by-step guide for creating a flavorful vegan tofu sauce perfect for pasta dishes. The ingredients are listed with precise measurements, ensuring consistency in taste and texture each time you prepare the sauce.
